heading_styles.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-medium text-[#001F3F]
heading_styles.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-[#001F3F]

spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (Technical Look): 1px solid borders using #E2E8F0, flat backgrounds, no excessive shadows. Focus on precision.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Single-column primary view. Content heavily left-aligned for data parsing clarity. Modified F-pattern scanning layout.

buttons.primary: bg-[#50C878] text-[#001F3F] font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-sm hover:bg-[#40A860] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#001F3F] focus:outline-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#708090] text-[#001F3F] font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-sm hover:bg-[#F8FAFC] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#001F3F] focus:outline-none

cards.style: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-sm p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

inputs.style: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-[#001F3F] focus:border-[#001F3F] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#001F3F] outline-none w-full

ai_guardrail.style: bg-[#FFFBEB] border-l-4 border-[#F59E0B] p-4 text-[#B45309] text-sm font-medium

ats_score.style: flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border-4 font-bold text-2xl h-24 w-24

interaction_and_motion.hover_states: Crisp color shifts, no slow fades. Text color explicitly defined on hover.
interaction_and_motion.focus_states: High contrast ring using Deep Navy (#001F3F) to ensure accessibility.

image_urls.description: Modern glass office building reflecting authority and structure.
Professional corporate headshot for demonstrating the AI generation feature.
Close-up of hands typing, representing data entry and resume building.

testing_requirements.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive and key informational elements. Use kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='ats-score-display', data-testid='generate-headshot-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a dense, professional look.
Stick to a single-column, career-grade UI for the resume builder layout to ensure a parse-safe styling focus. Emphasize data clarity over visual flair.
Enforce the 'No-Fabrication AI Guardrail' visually with the warning colors provided and display clear 'Add metric here' flags when data is missing.
Build the dashboard using a Grid Borders pattern: sharp 1px borders (#E2E8F0), minimal rounded corners (rounded-sm max), and flat backgrounds.
Never use generic AI Purple gradients. Adhere strictly to the Deep Navy, Emerald Green, and Slate Gray palette.
Do NOT use raw HTML input type='date' or generic select tags. Use Shadcn components heavily customized to match the sharp, flat aesthetic.
Apply pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing/landing areas, but utilize Shadcn for internal builder logic.
Make sure all interactable elements (buttons, links, forms) include a data-testid attribute.
Use JavaScript exclusively. Do not use TypeScript syntax (.js and .jsx only).
